pages.title: Arsenal rituals
pages.text: Every Arsenal ritual is scribed on a standard $(l:bloodmagic:rituals)Ritual Stone$() array — no new block required. Bind the master stone with a $(item)Weak Activation Crystal$() or higher after the layout is laid.$(br2)Each ritual below has its own stone layout and LP cost; open the in-game $(l:bloodmagic:rituals)Ritual$() viewer for the exact diagram.

pages.title: Blood Burner
pages.text: Converts stored LP into fuel-tick energy inside an adjacent burning setup — feeds furnaces and compatible machines directly from the altar network. Useful when your mob farm outpaces your coal supply.

pages.title: Purification
pages.text: Cleanses affected items and entities inside the ritual's radius — strips negative modifiers and status effects. A rescue ritual for over-enchanted gear and cursed mobs.

pages.title: Modifier Removal
pages.text: The counter to $(l:bloodmagic:soa_additions_ba/modifiers)the Modifier Tome$(). Place a stasis tool on the master stone and the ritual strips all applied modifiers back into reclaimable crystals. Expensive — intended for rebuilds, not tinkering.

pages.title: Sanguine Infusion (ritual form)
pages.text: A larger-scale version of the $(l:bloodmagic:soa_additions_ba/altare)Altare Aenigmatica$()'s infusion recipes — ritual-gated for outputs the altare alone can't produce. Rarely the shortest path; included for completeness.
